channel.title: Election on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Election on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Election Season Training Camp: Promises FC vs Delivery United
item.description: Pre-Season Friendly. Promises FC and Delivery United line up for another exhibition match. The scoreboard reads STILL 0-0. The crowd has signs. The referee is not sure which side to call.

item.title: Auntie Cheryl Speaks — Trinidad, Monday April 6, 2026
item.description: Auntie Cheryl, calling from Chaguanas, is overjoyed about Kamla and has prepared cook-up to celebrate.

item.title: Miss Violet's Corner — Barbados, Monday April 6, 2026
item.description: Miss Violet, retired teacher from St Philip, is very proud of PM Mottley and unimpressed by people who did not vote.

item.title: The Bajan Bugle — Barbados Brief, Monday April 6, 2026
item.description: Mottley wins 30-0 again. Voter turnout hits a historic low. Kensington Oval dropped from cricket schedule. The Bajan Bugle reads the small print.

item.title: The Trini Dispatch — Trinidad & Tobago Brief, Monday April 6, 2026
item.description: T&T just elected Kamla. The dust is settling, the promises are flying, and a cyclist died at Easter Prix. The Trini Dispatch has the full picture.

item.title: Caribbean Brief: Barbados Votes TODAY, Cuba on 4-Day Work Week, Jamaica Shaken
item.description: Barbados goes to the polls as Mottley seeks historic third term, Cuba adopts emergency 4-day work week over fuel crisis, Jamaica rattled by 5.0 earthquake, and Trinidad Carnival is days away.

item.title: 🌴 Caribbean Brief: Barbados Election Countdown, Trinidad's Police Scandal, and Carnival Season Heats Up
item.description: Barbados heads to polls February 11 with Mottley seeking a historic third term, Trinidad reels from CCTV footage of a police shooting, Carnival season kicks into high gear, and West Indies prep for T20 World Cup. Your regional Caribbean news roundup.
